text.title: Requirements Documentation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does engagement require formal documented requirements?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

example.trace: audit=yes → audience=engineering → SRS with 18 requirements, all AC-linked, review_state=approved.
